description: Create deterministic contract fixtures and adapters for Exa Search/Contents, SAM.gov, OpenGov, BidNet, Jido web fetch/session, and provider-specific Playwright. Normalize success, empty, throttled, auth, schema-drift, WAF, timeout, and partial payload cases. Acceptance: provider parsers and normalized retrieval results run offline in CI; secrets and live network access are not required.
title: Build provider contract fixture harness
